thumbnail_concept: A split-screen faceless setup: a dusty local server rig with glowing green components on the left versus a pristine but cracked cloud icon leaking shredded dollar bills on the right, separated by a jagged lightning bolt. A silhouetted creator sits in the middle with hands on head in shock. Red accent arrows point to exploding receipt totals.
emotional_trigger: The sinking dread that you're bleeding money on cloud AI every month while a cheaper local alternative hides in plain sight.
